content.problemStatement:
Chef plans to celebrate Christmas by baking a cake.

Christmas falls on the 252525-th of December.

Every day before Christmas, till the 242424-th of December, Chef will bake **exactly one** practice cake.

Today is the XXX-th of December. How many practice cakes will Chef bake starting from today?


Input Format

The first and only line of input will contain a single integer XXX — today's date.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer: the number of practice cakes Chef will bake.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
If today is the 181818-th of December, Chef will bake one cake on each of the dates 18,19,20,21,22,23,2418, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 2418,19,20,21,22,23,24, which is 777 in total.

Explanation:
Chef will bake one cake on every day from 111 to 242424, which is 242424 cakes in total.
